command: show evpn mac-table instance HA_TEST_ELAN | no-more
output_preview:
Codes: L - Local route, B - BGP route, P - Suppressed, F - E-Tree-Leaf, V - VXLAN
       I - Suppressed Indefinitely, i - Static ARP, s - Sticky, si - Sticky Interface,
       M - Only MAC-IP received, > - Selected route, S - Stale route,
       ri - router-interface, G - Default Gateway, v - VPLS PW

EVPN: HA_TEST_ELAN
  EVI ID : 1

  ETH TAG: 0
    Flags     | MAC address          | ESI                           | Nexthop                | Label/VNI   | Resolution        
    ------------------
